_comment_rewrites: Hub subdomain routing (sub.creatorcanon.com -> workspace slug) is NOT configured
as Vercel rewrites. It lives in apps/web/src/middleware.ts (ticket 8.2)
because the mapping needs DB/Redis access to look up published-hub state,
Only add a real `rewrites` key here for static concerns like /.well-known/*
or legacy redirect paths. Subdomain logic stays in middleware.
Custom-domain attachment (post-launch, concierge only) will be wired via
the Vercel Domains API from the admin console, not from this file.
